title: Prestwick Airport 'not being used by US to launch strikes', says UK Government

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Prestwick Airport 'not being used by US to launch strikes', says UK Government. Prestwick Airport is not being used by the US to launch military strikes, the UK Government has said.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Prestwick Airport 'not being used by US to launch strikes', says UK Government
